title: His Offering, With The Rest, At The Sepulchre.
content:
To join with them who here confer
    Gifts to my Saviour's sepulchre,
    Devotion bids me hither bring
    Somewhat for my thank-offering.
    Lo! thus I bring a virgin flower,
    To dress my Maiden Saviour.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "His Offering, With The Rest, At The Sepulchre."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
